title: To A Child - Written In Her Album
content:
Small service is true service while it lasts:
 Of humblest Friends, bright Creature! scorn not one:
 The Daisy, by the shadow that it casts,
 Protects the lingering dew-drop from the Sun.
meaning:
"To A Child - Written In Her Album" is a quintessential example of William Wordsworth's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
